_comment: EOS System Topology — seed data for EOS.Horizon production build. Inferred from the drawio architecture diagram + EOS user documentation. The production team should validate, correct, and extend this. Fields marked '?' are best-guesses that need confirmation.

systems.name: EOS
systems.description: Core ETRM application — trade capture, cargo operations, valuations, settlement
systems.notes: The system being modernised. All trade data originates here.

systems.name: RabbitMQ
systems.description: Single message broker instance — all integration flows through this
systems.notes: One instance per environment. Management UI on port 15672. All Glint modules connect to this.

systems.name: EOS Scheduler EOD
systems.description: End-of-day batch scheduler — triggers EOD processing in EOS
systems.notes: Runs daily ~17:00. Triggers market data load, curve bootstrap, position calc, VaR, settlement prices, regulatory reports.

systems.name: DQ Prices
systems.description: External price data provider — supplies market prices to EOS
systems.notes: Bidirectional — EOS both receives and may push price data. Source of JKM, TTF, HH, Brent settlement prices.

systems.name: ICE
systems.description: Intercontinental Exchange — source of exchange-traded data
systems.notes: Trade data flows through KTP → Shovel pipeline before reaching RabbitMQ.

systems.name: KTP
systems.description: ICE data adapter — receives raw ICE data and normalises it
systems.notes: Part of the ICE ingress pipeline. Sits between ICE and Shovel.

systems.name: Shovel
systems.description: RabbitMQ Shovel plugin — moves messages from KTP into the main RabbitMQ instance
systems.notes: Built-in RabbitMQ feature. Bridges external KTP queue into internal exchange.

systems.name: Pioneer
systems.description: Downstream system — receives trade/recap data and settlement data from EOS
systems.notes: Two separate data flows: trade/recap and settlements. Each via its own Glint connector.

systems.name: HQ PnL Reporting
systems.notes: Receives aggregated P&L data from EOS via Glint HQ PnL module. Not available in all environments.

systems.name: Credit Cube
systems.description: Credit risk management system — receives exposure data from EOS
systems.notes: EOS pushes credit exposure data. Used for counterparty credit limit monitoring.

systems.name: Endur
systems.description: Legacy ETRM — source of Spanish gas trade data
systems.notes: One-way: Endur pushes Spanish gas trades into EOS via Glint module. Not available in UAT/TEST.

systems.name: VaR Engine
systems.description: Value-at-Risk calculation engine — receives position data from EOS
systems.notes: EOS extracts position data via Glint module, VaR engine processes and returns results.

systems.name: a2kvan
systems.description: Port distance calculation service — provides voyage distance data to EOS
systems.notes: MANUAL pull — not automated. Operators manually retrieve port distance data and enter into EOS.

systems.name: AX Cloud Shared Drive
systems.description: SharePoint / cloud storage — EOS exports invoices as PDF here
systems.notes: One-way push from EOS. Invoices saved as PDF for downstream consumption.

systems.name: SAP Document
systems.description: SAP financial system — receives settlement documents from EOS
systems.notes: Settlement data flows via Glint MA module. Final output is an Excel/document download. Not automated end-to-end.

integrationComponents.name: Glint ICE Trade Capture
integrationComponents.description: Consumes ICE trade data from RabbitMQ, transforms and writes to EOS
integrationComponents.notes: Receives from Shovel, publishes validated trades to EOS database.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Price Loading
integrationComponents.description: Loads price/curve data into EOS from external sources
integrationComponents.notes: Critical for EOD — must complete before curve bootstrap runs.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Price EoD Export
integrationComponents.description: Exports end-of-day settlement prices from EOS
integrationComponents.notes: Triggered after EOD settlement price load completes.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Pioneer Trade Connector
integrationComponents.description: Pushes trade/recap data from EOS to Pioneer
integrationComponents.notes: Near-real-time. Pioneer expects trade events within seconds of capture.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Pioneer Settlements Connector
integrationComponents.description: Pushes settlement data from EOS to Pioneer
integrationComponents.notes: Batch-oriented. Settlements typically pushed after EOD processing.

integrationComponents.name: Glint HQ PnL Reporting
integrationComponents.description: Extracts P&L data from EOS and pushes to HQ reporting system
integrationComponents.notes: Daily and month-end. Not available in all non-prod environments.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Credit Cube
integrationComponents.description: Pushes credit exposure data from EOS to Credit Cube
integrationComponents.notes: Triggered on trade capture and EOD revaluation.

integrationComponents.name: Glint Endur Spanish Gas
integrationComponents.description: Imports Spanish gas trades from Endur into EOS
integrationComponents.notes: Spanish gas specific. Endur is legacy — this bridge may be retired when Endur is decommissioned.

integrationComponents.name: Glint VaR Extract
integrationComponents.description: Extracts position data from EOS for VaR calculation
integrationComponents.notes: Triggered after EOD position calculation. VaR engine processes and may return results (not via RabbitMQ?).

integrationComponents.name: Glint MA
integrationComponents.description: Master Agreements / Settlements connector — pushes settlement data to SAP
integrationComponents.notes: Final output is a document (Excel/PDF) for SAP. May not be fully automated.

exchanges.name: eos.inbound
exchanges.description: Inbound data flowing INTO EOS from external systems

exchanges.name: eos.outbound
exchanges.description: Outbound data flowing FROM EOS to downstream systems

exchanges.name: eos.internal
exchanges.description: ? Internal EOS events (audit, notifications, scheduler triggers)
exchanges._comment: This exchange may or may not exist — inferred from the need for audit/notification queues

messageTypes.description: Trade fields modified after initial capture
ICE exchange trade received via KTP/Shovel pipeline
Spanish gas trade imported from Endur
Market price update received from DQ Prices
Daily P&L report extract for HQ
Credit exposure recalculated — pushed to Credit Cube
Position data extracted for VaR calculation

dataFlows.name: Price Ingress
dataFlows.description: Market prices from DQ Prices into EOS for curve building and valuation
dataFlows.notes: Must complete before EOD curve bootstrap. Bidirectional — EOS may also push derived prices back.

dataFlows.name: ICE Trade Ingress
dataFlows.description: Exchange-traded data from ICE through KTP/Shovel pipeline into EOS
dataFlows.notes: High volume. KTP normalises ICE format. Shovel bridges into RabbitMQ.

dataFlows.name: Trade/Recap to Pioneer
dataFlows.description: Trade lifecycle events pushed to Pioneer for downstream processing
dataFlows.notes: Pioneer expects events within seconds. Latency SLA: <5s.

dataFlows.name: Settlements to Pioneer
dataFlows.description: Settlement completion events pushed to Pioneer

dataFlows.name: Spanish Gas Trade Import
dataFlows.description: Spanish gas trades from Endur legacy system into EOS
dataFlows.notes: Legacy integration. May be retired when Endur is decommissioned.

dataFlows.name: VaR Position Extract
dataFlows.description: Position data extracted from EOS for VaR engine processing

dataFlows.name: Credit Exposure Update
dataFlows.description: Credit exposure data pushed to Credit Cube on trade events and EOD

dataFlows.name: HQ PnL Reporting
dataFlows.description: P&L reports extracted and pushed to HQ reporting system

dataFlows.name: Settlement to SAP
dataFlows.description: Settlement documents generated and pushed to SAP via Glint MA
dataFlows.notes: Final leg may be manual (Excel download).

dataFlows.name: Invoice PDF Export
dataFlows.description: EOS exports invoices as PDF to AX Cloud shared drive
dataFlows.notes: Direct file write — not via RabbitMQ. No message type.

dataFlows.name: Port Distance Manual Pull
dataFlows.description: Operators manually retrieve port distance data from a2kvan into EOS

dataFlows.name: EOD Batch Trigger
dataFlows.description: EOS Scheduler triggers end-of-day processing in EOS

_validationNotes: All fields marked '?' need confirmation from the EOS/platform team
RabbitMQ exchange names (eos.inbound, eos.outbound, eos.internal) are inferred — verify against actual RabbitMQ config
Routing key patterns are best-guesses based on common RabbitMQ conventions
The eos.internal exchange may not exist — audit and notification queues might use eos.outbound
KTP and Shovel are inferred from the diagram — verify technology and ownership
Some data flows (invoice PDF, port distance, EOD batch) may not use RabbitMQ at all
Docker image names are inferred from the Glint module names — verify against actual container registry
Message type names follow {Domain}.{Action} convention — verify against actual message contracts
Consumer assignments are 1:1 in this model — in practice a queue might have multiple consumers
